actions.instruction: Verify the correct name and update the inconsistent source document through its issuing authority.
Ask the bank to correct the account-holder name or provide a bank record matching the identity document.
Renew the expired document through its issuing authority and extract the replacement.
Confirm the current address and correct or replace inconsistent documents where required.
Answer the generated follow-up question and rerun the assessment.
Confirm the current family composition and correct the inconsistent source record through its issuing authority.
Review the final report, then apply through the program's official application channel.
